admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: S008A/K001/REAL012 prove active C002 question search and sampled real-question ordered search; P001 still needs field performance/access review.
admissionMatrix.allowedAction: maintain current search API, collect query logs, and design benchmark.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得把非现场 smoke 当现场性能验收。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no FTS miss-case corpus, latency p95 breach, extension evidence, embedding model/cost/cache/privacy plan, or index rebuild script.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得新增 pgvector migration、embedding table、default semantic route 或教师可见语义检索承诺。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no operational search bottleneck, external index rebuild plan, permission filter proof, backup/restore plan, or ops owner.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得引入独立搜索服务或外部搜索依赖作为 v0.1 默认路径。
